name: TurtleRun
short_description: Slow and steady? Not this turtle! Leap, dodge, shoot, and parry your way back through this mysterious land to reunite with your beloved home.This fast-paced platformer is packed with tricky platforming levels, engaging mini-games, intense boss fights, and a determined turtle on a mission.
detailed_description:
Overview:

TurtleRun is a challenging 2D platformer that follows the journey of a turtle protagonist, unexpectedly swept away from his peaceful pond. Join him on a perilous adventure as he navigates through various challenges to find his way back home.

Gameplay:

Defeat enemies and confront challenging bosses as you test your platforming and shooting skills. Leap, dodge, shoot, and parry your way through diverse terrains, navigating obstacles and uncovering the secrets behind your sudden misplacement along the way.

Engage in mini-games to enhance your chances before facing off against powerful bosses.

Developer:

TurtleRun is the debut project of Cappiche Games, a solo developer, offering a heartfelt gaming experience born from passion and dedication.

Visuals and Audio:

Enjoy the cosy pixel-art style and relaxing music as you overcome various challenges.
